prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same hand from upper-left, same bag silhouette and proportions, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo (DIALED top-LEFT + horizontal line with center EKG spike + HEALTH bottom-RIGHT, OFFSET diagonal layout) in the upper area of the bag, same QR code on the centered/lower-middle area of the bag, same line-art style on pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line work.

THE ONLY MODIFICATION — REDRAW the assembled protector tube being lowered into the bag so it is THINNER AND TALLER. Current version is too wide and too short. New proportions:
  - Overall tube (white body + black cap stacked) is SLIM AND TALL: total height ≈ 2.5x its diameter. Diameter is narrow — about the width of an adult thumb. Think tall pill bottle / lipstick tube proportions, not stout jar.
  - WHITE HEALTH BODY (lower section): tall narrow cylinder. Height ≈ 1.7x diameter on its own. 'HEALTH' embossed horizontally across its side wall in bold sans-serif capitals, wrapping with the cylinder curvature.
  - BLACK DIALED CAP (upper section, sitting on top): same narrow diameter as the body. Cap height ≈ 0.8x diameter (shorter than the body section). Solid black fill, with 'DIALED' showing in white/reversed-out capitals embossed across its side wall. Flat solid-black top.
  - The hand pinches the BLACK CAP between thumb and fingers. With the tube taller, more of the white HEALTH body extends down into the bag (drawn faintly through the translucent plastic), and the black DIALED cap (plus a small portion of the white body just below it) stays above the zip seal.
  - The narrow tube means the hand visually dominates — the tube fits between thumb and index finger with room to spare.

The SECOND reference image is the real product photo for proportions (the narrow cylindrical shape). The THIRD reference image is the approved step 21 illustration for the locked illustrated look of the tube (white HEALTH body + black DIALED cap, line-art treatment).

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand pose, same bag shape, same zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo, same QR code, same line weight, same white background, same line-art style. Pure black ink line work on white; the only solid-black fill is the protector tube's cap. No red, no other color. No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube.png
